headline: Elizabeth Warren asks Meta, Amazon, and others why they're laying workers off despite tax perks
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is grilling several major employers, including Amazon, Target, and UPS, about their recent spate of layoffs amid tax perks to corporations.

headline: Home Depot's Real-Time Delivery Tracking Enhances Omnichannel Momentum
summary: HD plans a real-time tracker for bulky material deliveries, giving contractors live GPS updates to better plan job-site schedules and reduce delays.

raw.headline: Home Depot's Real-Time Delivery Tracking Enhances Omnichannel Momentum
raw.summary: HD plans a real-time tracker for bulky material deliveries, giving contractors live GPS updates to better plan job-site schedules and reduce delays.

headline: Home Depot Bets On Real Time Delivery Tracking To Deepen Pro Loyalty
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) has introduced a real-time delivery tracker for large and bulky materials tailored to its Pro customers. The tool provides minute-by-minute updates and visibility on deliveries of critical building supplies. The launch targets contractors and project managers who rely on timely material arrivals to keep jobs on schedule. Home Depot is a major home improvement retailer with a large and important Pro customer base that includes contractors, remodelers, and property...

headline: RTH: Consumer Discretionary Dashboard For March

headline: Is The Home Depot, Inc. (HD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is HD a good stock to buy now? We came across a bullish thesis on The Home Depot, Inc. on R. Dennis’s Substack by OppCost. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on HD. The Home Depot, Inc.’s share was trading at $357.15 as of March 10th. HD’s trailing and forward P/E were 25.10 and 23.87 respectively […]
